LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, SUBMITTED ON AUG-15-2006 BY PETER J. BUSCH. BEFORE THE ARGUMENT, JUDGE'S PERSONAL DISCLOSURE WAS PUT ON THE RECORD. MS. DEELAY PRESENTED A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE COURT AND THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SUBMITTED HER PROPOSED ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS TO SUBMIT HIS PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (ENTIRE ACTION)
